title: Jellyfishing Delight
body: ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab44c18820d1835adc78a16d4c42408cabe7c78.png) # Welcome to Jellyfishing Delight! # **Jellyfish Delight is an addon for Farmer's Delight and Jellyfishing!** This mod will giving you more and more foods from Bikini Bottom, the colorful krabby patties, cooking coral and more! And now, you can plant the krabby patty! Don't forget the grill, if we used it under water, it's will make cooking speed fast 30% more!
